states.name: Neutrals
diplomacy: Corum declared a war on its rival Cevia

notes.name: 1st (Ceve) Regiment
notes.legend:
Regiment was formed in 241 Yelach Era during the Coruman Conquest. 1st (Ceve) Regiment is stationed in Ceve. 

Regiment composition in 533 YE:
— archers: 1167
— cavalry: 112
— artillery: 52
— infantry: 878.

notes.name: Cinisania Purifying Well
notes.legend: This legendary water source is whispered about in ancient tales and believed to possess mystical properties. The spring emanates crystal-clear water, shimmering with an otherworldly iridescence that sparkles even in the dimmest light.

notes.name: Masarmanshe — lead mining town
notes.legend: Masarmanshe is a mining town of 1676 people just nearby the lead mine.

notes.name: The Hungry Tavern
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious pickled cake with green nectar is served here.

notes.name: The Favorable Tavern
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious roasted oranges with fire tequila is served here.

notes.name: The Divine Bison
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious dressed pottage with brown water is served here.

notes.name: Rausium Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Pidamnosian Conflict. 
Date: August 22, 327 Yelach Era.

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Hararen Monster
notes.legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 10 m long.

notes.name: Stymphe Forest
notes.legend: A forest sacred to local Faith of Kimnos.

notes.name: Matrix Hares
notes.legend: A gang of forest robbers.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Vintium Statue
notes.legend:
An ancient statue. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ᢏᢤᡙᢋᠠ᠀ᠦᠩᡑᢑᡖᡏᢏ᠒ᠧᠮᢞᡕᢓᢁᡓᡔᡔᠧᢦᡳᠾᡳᡰᠡᡏᡆᢥᢦᡜᢓᡯᡞᠱᡀᢑᠧᡗᢂᠮᡰᢛᡙᠲᢠᠻᠧ

notes.name: Ruined Castle
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient castle. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Senia Library
notes.legend: A vast collection of knowledge, including many rare and ancient tomes.

notes.name: Travelling World-famous Circus
notes.legend: Roll up, roll up, this world-famous circus is here for a limited time only.

notes.name: Hubdenaipo Competition
notes.legend: Warriors from around the land gather for a competition of acumen in Hubdenaipo, with fame, fortune and favour on offer to the victor.

notes.name: Sirnonodu Fair
notes.legend: A fair is being held in Sirnonodu, with all manner of local and foreign goods and services on offer.

notes.name: Random encounter
notes.legend: You have encountered a character.
